headline: Is Boeing (BA) Becoming Attractive After Recent 40% One Year Share Price Gain?
summary: If you are wondering whether Boeing at around US$223 per share is starting to look like value or still carries a premium, the recent share performance offers a useful starting point. The stock has gained 0.6% over the last week and 14.5% over the last month, while the 1 year return sits at 40.2% alongside a modest year to date decline of 1.9% and a 5 year return of 7.5% decline. These moves sit against a backdrop of ongoing attention on Boeing's operational execution, regulatory scrutiny and...

headline: Fed Chair Hearing, Tesla Earnings: What to Watch This Week
summary: Earnings season kicks into high gear this week, with nearly 20% of the S&P 500 scheduled to report quarterly earnings. Big names reporting include Tesla, Boeing and Intel. Investors will also watch the scheduled testimony of Kevin Warsh, President Trump’s nominee for Federal Reserve chair, for signals on how he’d lead the central bank.
